content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by retrofitting curiosity-driven exploration signals from intrinsic reward models like ICM and RND to prioritize which new episodic memories to retain, rather than just retaining all encountered observations or selecting data by prediction uncertainty alone. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where the agent’s growing memory of surprising, unexpected experiences further refines its intrinsic curiosity signal to explore more informative unlabeled data.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
